content.en:
The 50,000 points of the Void Source Hall are not a small amount, and even if the Supreme wants to collect some points, it will be extremely difficult.

Moreover, many powerful Supreme Void Sons also need points, after all, the Void Source Tablet is still useful to them.

In addition, some Void Children have top supreme beings behind them or as elders, and they will ask their elders to earn points for themselves, and this is the opportunity.

If they get 50,000 points, they are enough to rise completely.

And the reason why Ye Tian is willing to pay a reward of 50,000 points is that now he has too many points, condensing the Void Source Body to get 30,000 points, breaking through the second layer of the Void Tower to get 30,000 points, and becoming a Void God Son to get another 10,000 points.

With these alone, he has gained a full 70,000 points, although he still spends some points, but even if he spends another 50,000 points, he still has a lot of points left, enough for him to use himself.

Moreover, the knowledge contained in that mysterious consciousness must be very amazing, if it is a real top supreme being, he has no way to kill the other party, and even if he can kill the other party, he has no chance to capture the other party's consciousness, once it falls, the consciousness will soon dissipate, forcibly condense the consciousness, and he will not be able to gain many memories.

Therefore, this special mystical consciousness is worth too much, enough to make him pay 50,000 points.

Tianlin Realm.

Akiba Genzu also knew about the reward of 50,000 points, and I have to say that he also needed 50,000 points, even if he didn't need it, but his force also had some Void Children, which could be used to cultivate them.

"It's a pity that I don't have a soul source!"

Akiba Genzu shook his head and said.

Many Void Sons or Supreme Beings are also like Akiba Genzu, who are very eager for 50,000 points, but they don't have a soul source device, so they can't get these 50,000 points at all.

Time passed slowly, and finally on the tenth day.

A son of the void came to the Void Source Palace, and asked Ye Tian to contact Ye Tian through the instrument spirit of the Void Source Palace.

"Finally someone contacted me!"

Ye Tian was a little excited, and immediately met with the Void Child.

Anyway, when he met the other party in the Void Source Palace, no matter how strong the other party was, it would not threaten him.

Ye Tian was still wearing a mask to hide his aura, unwilling to reveal his true identity, but the other party did not hide his identity.

Therefore, Ye Tian recognized the other party for the first time.

Child of the Void - Bailun!

This is a son of the void of the Supreme Realm, and his strength is naturally far superior to Ye Tian.

Ye Tian and the Son of Bailun Void didn't say any nonsense and traded directly.

I saw Bailun take out a treasure like a cyan water droplet, and introduced: "This is the source weapon water soul, once it is urged, it can instantly freeze the soul consciousness, and you can strip the other party's memory, but if the other party's strength is stronger than yours, you still can't easily peel off the opponent's consciousness." "

"What if the strength is far superior to mine, but only soul fragments remain?" Ye Tian asked.

"It can be done!"

Bailun nodded.

"Very good, then let's trade!" Ye Tian said.

Soon, Ye Tian transferred 50,000 points to the other party, and the source weapon water soul fell into Ye Tian's hands.

The deal is completed and Balance leaves.

And Ye Tian began to refine the source weapon in the Void Source Palace, with his current realm of a second-class invincible, it was much easier to refine the source weapon than in the past.

After a period of time, Ye Tian refined the Water Soul Source Device, and controlled it freely.

In addition, he also found some robber beasts and tested the Water Soul Source Device to ensure that he could use the Water Soul Source Device proficiently.

Subsequently, he gave the Water Soul Source Device to the Invincible Ancestor Clone, and the Invincible Ancestor Clone was also the same as the main soul, but his cultivation had always stayed in the third-rank Invincible realm, so there was no problem in using the Water Soul Source Device.

......

Void Gold Mountain.

Ye Tian came here with the Water Soul Source Device and entered the consciousness space of the mysterious consciousness.

The mysterious consciousness saw Ye Tian, and scolded angrily: "Damn guy, you are here again, I said, if you don't merge me with your junior, I won't say anything you want to know." "

"I'm here to negotiate with you, and I can agree to your request, but ......"

Ye Tian said.

"But what?" the mystical consciousness excited.

At the moment when the mysterious consciousness was excited, Ye Tian made a move.

He deliberately aroused the excitement of the mysterious consciousness, because he was afraid that the mysterious consciousness would instantly annihilate his consciousness, which would cause him to fail.

And the excitement that caused the mysterious consciousness, he would not annihilate his soul in an instant, and even if he reacted, it would take a little time to change his mentality.

In the consciousness space, a drop of water emerged, instantly freezing this consciousness space.

And the figure transformed into a mysterious consciousness was also frozen, with a hint of anger on his expression, but he didn't have time to do anything else.

"Extract memories!"

Ye Tian urged the Water Soul Source Instrument to turn into countless white silk rays of light and poured into the depths of the mysterious consciousness, extracting a large amount of memories and passing them to Ye Tian's hands, turning into a mass of memory fragments.

As time passed, more and more memories were extracted from the Water Soul Source Device, but Ye Tian's consumption was also very large, and that mysterious consciousness was also resisting.

I have to say that the strength of that mysterious consciousness was indeed very strong, even if only the incomplete consciousness remained, it could still shake the water soul source device, if it weren't for Ye Tian's strength being strong enough and his control over the eternal rules high enough, he really couldn't suppress the mysterious consciousness.

I don't know how long it has been, the mysterious consciousness has finally collapsed, and Ye Tian can't continue to extract his memories.

"It worked!"

Ye Tian looked at the large number of memories in front of him and said with satisfaction.

In the years that followed, he began to absorb these memories little by little, to understand the identity of this mysterious consciousness and its various secrets.

Many useless memories were all eliminated by him, and only those useful memories remained.

Of course, these memories are not all memories, but from these memories, Ye Tian has already obtained the secrets he wants to know.

For example, the reason why his descendant Ye Jinpeng was able to fuse the Eternal Origin Origin was because Ye Jinpeng's soul qualification was special, and he was born with the Origin Fit.

The compatibility between normal beings and the Eternal Source is only about 1%, and only after cultivating to the realm of a first-class invincible, creating a supreme technique, and then condensing the Eternal Tribulation Body, can the compatibility be increased to 30%.

At this level of fit, coupled with its own strong strength, it can absorb the origin of the eternal source and forcibly ascend to the supreme realm.

However, there is a kind of creature that is born 100% compatible with the origin of the eternal source, as long as it finds the right eternal source, it can easily absorb the eternal source, so as to break through to the supreme realm, and even do not need to condense the eternal calamity and create the supreme technique, and when it breaks through to the supreme realm, it is also possible to slowly master the supreme technique and the eternal calamity body.

And Ye Jinpeng belongs to the soul fit of a kind of soul type of eternal source - Eternal Soul Wood, which is enough to rank among the top thirty eternal source objects, and the mysterious one is to use the origin of the Eternal Soul Wood to preserve his soul consciousness, so as to find a soul fit with the Eternal Soul Wood.

Only in this way can the mysterious one be reborn again, and even surpass the peak.

In fact, there are not very few creatures in the Source Sea that fit the Eternal Source Object, but they will not be able to encounter the Eternal Source Object that is 100% compatible with them in their lifetime, so they will not be able to discover this special physique.

I have to say that Ye Jinpeng is lucky, but Ye Tian is even luckier, because the memory of the mysterious person contains a lot of secrets and opportunities.
